name: coalmine
description: CoalMine — a quality meta-skills suite for coding agents (canary-in-the-coal-mine early warning).

plugins.name: coalmine
plugins.description: 5 quality meta-skills: rotcanary (code-health), gold-standard (world-class completeness), source-grounding (anti-hallucination), supply-chain-audit (deps/build/artifact), resilience-audit (failure-mode). rotcanary adds cross-platform auto-cadence hooks.
